tasks.subject: Task 0: Branch + version bump
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cut feature/v0.4.0 off develop and bump every workspace crate to 0.4.0 via inherited [workspace.package].

**Files:**
- Modify: Cargo.toml

**Verify:** cargo build --workspace

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["on feature/v0.4.0 branch", "all crates 0.4.0", "workspace builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Tunnel core types in safessh-core
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add TunnelId, TunnelSpec, TunnelCloseReason, TunnelRecord to safessh-core.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/safessh-core/src/tunnel.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-core/src/lib.rs
- Test: crates/safessh-core/tests/tunnel_types.rs

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-core --test tunnel_types

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-core/src/tunnel.rs", "crates/safessh-core/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-core/tests/tunnel_types.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-core --test tunnel_types", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TunnelId 8-char", "TunnelSpec parse validates", "TunnelCloseReason kebab-case", "TunnelRecord toml round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Active tunnels store in safessh-storage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TunnelStore that persists records atomically to state/tunnels/<id>.toml; lists, removes, reaps dead.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/safessh-storage/src/tunnels.rs
- Modify: crates/safessh-storage/src/{lib.rs, paths.rs, Cargo.toml}
- Test: crates/safessh-storage/tests/tunnels.rs

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-storage --test tunnels

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/tunnels.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/src/paths.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/tunnels.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage --test tunnels", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tunnels_dir", "atomic add/list/remove", "reap_dead"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Schema bumps for PendingRequest + PatternRule
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PendingRequest gains tunnel: Option<String>; PatternRule gains category: Option<String>. Both serde(default).

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-storage --test schema_v04 && cargo build --workspace

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-storage/src/approvals.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/file_common.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/approvals.rs", "crates/safessh-storage/tests/schema_v04.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-storage --test schema_v04 && cargo build --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["v0.3 backward compat", "v0.4 round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Audit events tunnel_open / tunnel_close
tasks.description:
**Goal:** event::tunnel_open / event::tunnel_close constructors.

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-audit --test tunnel_events

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-audit/src/event.rs", "crates/safessh-audit/tests/tunnel_events.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-audit --test tunnel_events", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tunnel_open carries opacity_warning", "tunnel_close reason kebab-case"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Policy decide_tunnel path
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TunnelOp::Forward(spec) and decide_tunnel arm. Default-deny network:tunnel (SAFETY-INVARIANT-15).

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-policy && cargo build --workspace

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-policy/src/decision.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/exec.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/file_common.rs", "crates/safessh-policy/tests/decide_tunnel.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-policy && cargo build --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default-deny", "category-level rules", "deny>allow"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SshDriver::open_tunnel + mock impl
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SshDriver trait extension + TunnelHandle trait + mock + OpenSsh stub.

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-ssh --test mock_tunnel

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/src/driver.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/mock.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/mock_tunnel.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-ssh --test mock_tunnel", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TunnelHandle trait", "mock unique pids", "openssh stub"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: OpenSshDriver::open_tunnel real subprocess
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace stub with real ssh -L -N spawn returning OpenSshTunnelHandle. SIGTERM-then-SIGKILL kill.

**Verify:** cargo build --workspace && cargo test --package safessh-ssh

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/src/openssh.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build --workspace && cargo test --package safessh-ssh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ssh -L -N", "non-blocking", "SIGTERM-then-SIGKILL"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Tunnel supervisor module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** safessh-cli supervisor that races ssh.wait() vs TTL vs cancellation; writes tunnel_close + removes state file.

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-cli --test supervisor_inline

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/supervisor.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/lib.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/Cargo.toml", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/supervisor_inline.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test supervisor_inline", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TTL/Cancel/SshDied paths", "audit-before-cleanup"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: forward CLI command + re-exec supervisor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** safessh <project> forward <spec> wired into TopCmd::External; re-execs as safessh __tunnel-supervisor for detached supervision.

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-cli --test forward_cli

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/forward.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/supervisor.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/forward_cli.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test forward_cli && cargo test --package safessh-cli --test supervisor_inline", "acceptanceCriteria": ["block/usage/allow paths", "re-exec detaches", "yolo honored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: tunnels list / close <id> CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tunnels { cmd } subcommand: list reaps+sorts, close cooperative SIGTERM with SIGKILL fallback.

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-cli --test tunnels_cli

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/tunnels.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/commands/mod.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/cli.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/src/main.rs", "crates/safessh-cli/tests/tunnels_cli.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-cli --test tunnels_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reap+sort", "cooperative+fallback", "fallback writes audit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Container integration test for tunnel lifecycle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** --features integration test using testcontainers + linuxserver/openssh-server: open->connect->kill->refused, plus 1s-TTL → TtlExpired.

**Verify:** cargo test --features integration --package safessh-ssh --test tunnel_integration (Linux only)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-ssh/tests/tunnel_integration.rs", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/fixtures/test_key", "crates/safessh-ssh/tests/fixtures/test_key.pub", "crates/safessh-ssh/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --features integration --package safessh-ssh --test tunnel_integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["open+connect+kill+refused", "TTL expiry"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Embedded skill markdown — forward / tunnels
tasks.description:
**Goal:** safessh.md gains ## Port forwarding section + tunnels list/close bullets + opacity-warning verbatim.

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-skill

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-skill/src/content/safessh.md", "crates/safessh-skill/tests/skill_content.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-skill", "acceptanceCriteria": ["forward section", "opacity warning verbatim", "tunnels bullets"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: TUI Approvals — tunnel approval variant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pending request with tunnel: Some(spec) → picker writes PatternRule with category=Some("network:tunnel").

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-tui --test approvals_tunnel

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/approvals.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/approvals_tunnel.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test approvals_tunnel", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tunnel row label", "category-tagged Always/Timed/Block"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: TUI Audit screen — tunnel summaries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** audit::summarize handles tunnel_open ([opaque] tag) and tunnel_close (reason+duration).

**Verify:** cargo test --package safessh-tui --test audit_tunnel_summary

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/safessh-tui/src/screens/audit.rs", "crates/safessh-tui/tests/audit_tunnel_summary.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --package safessh-tui --test audit_tunnel_summary", "acceptanceCriteria": ["[opaque] tag", "reason+duration"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 15: Documentation — tunnels.md, security, policy, cli-ref, README, CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New docs/tunnels.md plus updates to security.md (SAFETY-INVARIANT-15), policy.md (network:tunnel), cli-reference.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md.

**Verify:** cargo test --workspace && git diff --check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/tunnels.md", "docs/security.md", "docs/policy.md", "docs/cli-reference.md", "README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace && git diff --check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new tunnels.md", "invariant-15", "README+CHANGELOG"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 16: Release rehearsal — rc.1 → v0.4.0
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merge feature → develop → main, tag v0.4.0-rc.1, verify on clean macOS arm64 + Linux x86_64, promote to v0.4.0.

**Verify:** Manual checklist gated.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rc.1 tag", "clean-machine verify", "v0.4.0 tag"]}
```
